response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the provided lyrics for 'Starlight' and the searched lyrics for 'Love Me!'. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized the provided Reference JSON for 'Starlight' and external research for 'Love Me!'. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles to the audio and on-screen burnt-in lyrics. Included a spoken segment between 03:56 and 04:15 where Subaru thanks her audience. Applied aggressive end-time truncation for rapid singing transitions.

subtitles.original: スターライト
subtitles.english: Starlight

subtitles.original: 願いのかけらを灯した
subtitles.english: I lit up the fragments of my wishes

subtitles.original: キミの腕を引いて どこへだってきらり飛んでゆけるんだ
subtitles.english: Pulling your arm, we can fly anywhere, sparkling

subtitles.original: ちょこっと不安な日も
subtitles.english: Even on days when I'm a little anxious

subtitles.original: 魔法をかけてハッピー
subtitles.english: I'll cast a spell and be happy

subtitles.original: 百人力で乗り越えていこう
subtitles.english: Let's overcome it with a hundred-man power

subtitles.original: アクアブルーに染まる
subtitles.english: Targeting the blue-dyed sky

subtitles.original: 大空にめがけた
subtitles.english: Targeting the blue-dyed sky

subtitles.original: 鼓動が弾んでく
subtitles.english: My heartbeat keeps bouncing

subtitles.original: We can fly そう僕らは
subtitles.english: We can fly, that's right, us

subtitles.original: この日をずっと待ってたんだ
subtitles.english: We've been waiting for this day forever

subtitles.original: まだ醒めないでStarlight
subtitles.english: Don't wake up yet, Starlight

subtitles.original: 僕らは止まらない
subtitles.english: We won't stop

subtitles.original: その光が消える1秒前まで
subtitles.english: Until one second before the light disappears

subtitles.original: 走り続けるよ
subtitles.english: We'll keep running

subtitles.original: 無限の宇宙に響いたキミを照らす声を
subtitles.english: The voice echoing in the infinite universe and illuminating you

subtitles.original: 強く抱いてきらり輝いてゆけ
subtitles.english: Clutching it tight, shine and go, sparkling

subtitles.original: ラブミ！
subtitles.english: Love Me!

subtitles.original: いつだって愛情が先に
subtitles.english: Love always comes first

subtitles.original: 走り出す僕らのランウェイを
subtitles.english: On our runway that's starting to move

subtitles.original: 頑丈とラッキーを盾に
subtitles.english: With sturdiness and luck as my shield

subtitles.original: 進みますアーユーレディー？
subtitles.english: I'll move forward, are you ready?

subtitles.original: 転んだって泣いたって僕ら
subtitles.english: Even if we fall or cry

subtitles.original: 慣れてるよ受け身はパーフェクト
subtitles.english: We're used to it, our breakfall is perfect

subtitles.original: 笑ってくれてありがと！
subtitles.english: Thank you for smiling for me!

subtitles.original: また僕は歌えるよ
subtitles.english: Now I can sing again

subtitles.original: 人生は不安ばっか正直自信はないけど
subtitles.english: Life is full of anxiety, honestly I'm not confident

subtitles.original: 君の隣だけは譲る気はないのです！
subtitles.english: But I have no intention of giving up the spot next to you!

subtitles.original: 僕らが出会えた奇跡のセカイ
subtitles.english: The miraculous world where we met

subtitles.original: 君の眼にどう映るかな
subtitles.english: How does it look in your eyes?

subtitles.original: 青より澄み渡る希望
subtitles.english: A hope that is clearer than blue

subtitles.original: 僕だけの大空だといいな
subtitles.english: I hope it's an 'Oozora' just for me

subtitles.original: 不確かな永遠より僕は
subtitles.english: Rather than an uncertain eternity

subtitles.original: 二人で過ごす今を歌いたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to sing about the 'now' we spend together

subtitles.original: この惑星の片隅続く
subtitles.english: Continuing in a corner of this planet

subtitles.original: あいまいミーゆえにラブミー
subtitles.english: Because of the ambiguous me, Love Me!

subtitles.original: ナンセンスな現実が 心を乱していった
subtitles.english: Nonsense reality disturbed my heart

subtitles.original: ラッキーの天秤の 裏側にあるアンラッキー
subtitles.english: On the other side of the scale of luck is unluckiness

subtitles.original: 転んだって泣いたって僕ら
subtitles.english: Even if we fall or cry

subtitles.original: 立ち上がる七転八倒さ
subtitles.english: We'll stand up, through all the ups and downs

subtitles.original: 笑ってくれてありがto!
subtitles.english: Thank you for smiling for me!

subtitles.original: まだ僕は走れるよ
subtitles.english: I can still keep running

subtitles.original: 人生の期待感は正直膨らむばっかでさ
subtitles.english: The expectations for life honestly just keep expanding

subtitles.original: 君の心の中 灯るひだまりなのです
subtitles.english: Inside your heart, it's a sunny spot that lights up

subtitles.original: 僕らが暮らしてる奇跡の時代
subtitles.english: The miraculous era we live in

subtitles.original: 君のコトどう照らすかな
subtitles.english: How will it illuminate you?

subtitles.original: 星より煌めいた
subtitles.english: Brighter than the stars

subtitles.original: 僕らしい太陽になれたら
subtitles.english: If I could become a sun like myself

subtitles.original: 不確かな永遠より僕は
subtitles.english: Rather than an uncertain eternity

subtitles.original: 二人で過ごす今を楽しんでいたい
subtitles.english: I want to enjoy the 'now' we spend together

subtitles.original: この惑星の片隅続く
subtitles.english: Continuing in a corner of this planet

subtitles.original: あいまいミーゆえにダンシング
subtitles.english: Because of the ambiguous me, Dancing!

subtitles.original: 今日は本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for today!

subtitles.original: ここまで活動できたのは応援してくれたみんなのおかげです！
subtitles.english: Being able to come this far is thanks to everyone who supported me!

subtitles.original: いつも本当にありがとう！みんな大好きだぞー！
subtitles.english: Thank you always! I love you all!

subtitles.original: ああ健やかな時も
subtitles.english: Ah, in health

subtitles.original: ああ病める時もきっと
subtitles.english: Ah, and in sickness, surely

subtitles.original: 伝えたいよこのメロディー
subtitles.english: I want to convey this melody

subtitles.english: I want to sing about the 'now' we spend together

subtitles.english: Continuing in a corner of this planet
